title: Suricatoos — Sensor Feed Manifest
description: The signed manifest the cloud serves at GET /agent/v1/feed/manifest (ADR-0007). Lists every Greenbone feed file, addressed by SHA-256, so a sensor downloads only the blobs it lacks (each verified by hash) from GET /agent/v1/feed/blob/{sha256}. The signature is Ed25519 over the canonical form (domain-tag 'suricatoos-feed-manifest-v1' + feed_version + path\tsha256\tsize per file, sorted by path), verified sensor-side against the CA public key pinned at enroll. Bound in lockstep by control-plane/feed (Go) and sensor/internal/feedsync (Go).

path.description: path relative to the feed root, forward slashes

signature.description: base64 Ed25519 over the canonical form
